message.content:
@startuml
title CVX-AI – Vue & Flask framework interaction\n\n**VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)**

actor User
participant Website
participant "Web Server" as WebServer
participant "Filesystem Server" as FilesystemServer
database "PC Filesystem" as PCFilesystem

User -> Website : opens
Website -> WebServer : initialize
note left of WebServer : http://localhost:8080/
Website -> FilesystemServer : initialize
note left of FilesystemServer : http://localhost:8090/
FilesystemServer -> PCFilesystem : read
PCFilesystem --> FilesystemServer : return\ndefault\ndirectory
note left of FilesystemServer : .../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"
FilesystemServer --> Website : provide\ndirectories
Website --> User : display\nSyncfusion\nFileManager\ncomponent

@enduml
